message:
test(ft-conformance): linalg.cholesky numpy subprocess conformance [bd-c36b]

Adds torch_linalg_cholesky_numpy_subprocess_conformance covering 8
SPD matrices: identity, scaled identity, diagonal SPD, tridiagonal
SPD (diagonally dominant), Hilbert 3x3 (notoriously ill-conditioned
but f64-stable at n=3), Pascal-style 4x4, 1x1 scalar, and explicit
2x2 SPD.

Tests the lower-triangular convention (upper=false) — both numpy
and FrankenTorch use the positive-diagonal sign so L is unique up
to rounding. Per-element relative tolerance of 1e-9.

Sister harness to the inv / solve harnesses. Files closure for the
cholesky slice of frankentorch-c36b.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
